positive: A stylized, highly detailed illustration of a bioluminescent mystical forest scene. The composition should be symmetrical, featuring a central group of stylized, flora-based entities (like floating luminous jellyfish and exotic ferns) surrounded by deep, cosmic space elements. Use strong silhouettes and clean linework. Color palette dominated by deep indigo, electric cyan, vibrant magenta, and luminous teal. The style should mimic glowing ink on dark parchment, emphasizing high contrast and negative space. The overall mood is ethereal, magical, and serene. Designed for a central, square apparel print.
negative: blurry, grainy, fuzzy, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, lowres, poor quality, noisy, jpeg artifacts, out of frame
